_provenance: schema-derived from AC-H1.6; row counts and day offsets are named constants, not live data

setup.note: TRIGGER_TELEMETRY_RETENTION_DAYS=90 per AC-H1.6; batched DELETE with LIMIT per sqlite-specialist PA-3

concurrent_write_test.description: A concurrent write attempt during retention rotation must succeed — retention must NOT lock long enough to block the cycle write
